parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  source_type,
  source_id,
  title,
  url,
  content_hash,
  last_checked,
  target_page,
  target_section,
  priority
FROM fafo_law_sources
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY priority DESC, id ASC;

=UPDATE fafo_law_sources
SET 
  content_hash = '{{ $json.newHash }}',
  last_checked = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.sourceDbId }};

=INSERT INTO fafo_law_changes (
  source_id,
  change_type,
  old_content_hash,
  new_content_hash,
  summary,
  severity,
  affected_pages,
  status
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.sourceDbId }},
  'content_modified',
  '{{ $json.oldHash }}',
  '{{ $json.newHash }}',
  'Law content has been modified. AI analysis in progress...',
  'unknown',
  '{"{{ $json.target_page }}": true}',
  'analyzing'
) RETURNING id;

parameters.command: =ssh -p 6969 dad@192.168.1.104 '/volume1/docker/home-it-department/fafo_law_analyzer.sh "{{ $('Calculate Content Hash').item.json.sourceId }}" "{{ $('Calculate Content Hash').item.json.oldContent }}" "{{ $('Calculate Content Hash').item.json.newContent }}"'

parameters.query:
=UPDATE fafo_law_changes
SET 
  summary = {{ $json.summary ? "'" + $json.summary.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  severity = '{{ $json.severity }}',
  affected_pages = '{{ $json.affectedPages }}'::jsonb,
  impact_assessment = {{ $json.impactAssessment ? "'" + $json.impactAssessment.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  updated_html = {{ $json.updatedHtml ? "'" + $json.updatedHtml.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  recommendations = {{ $json.recommendations ? "'" + $json.recommendations.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  status = 'pending_approval',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.changeRecordId }};

parameters.text:
=🤖 **AI Law Analysis - APPROVAL REQUIRED**

**Source:** {{ $json.title }}
**Source ID:** {{ $json.sourceId }}
**Severity:** {{ $json.severity === 'major' ? '🔴 MAJOR' : '🟡 MINOR' }}
**Change Record ID:** #{{ $json.changeRecordId }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📋 **AI Summary:**
{{ $json.summary }}

🎯 **Impact on Families:**
{{ $json.impactAssessment }}

📄 **Affected FAFO Pages:**
{{ $json.analysis.affected_pages.map(p => `- ${p}.html`).join('\n') }}

💡 **AI Recommendations:**
{{ $json.recommendations }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 **Law Details:**
- URL: {{ $json.url }}
- Priority: {{ $json.priority }}/10
- Target: {{ $json.targetPage }}.html → {{ $json.targetSection }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚠️ **MANUAL APPROVAL REQUIRED**

{{ $json.severity === 'major' ? '🔴 **CRITICAL:** This is a MAJOR change affecting families\' rights or procedures!' : '🟡 This is a minor administrative change.' }}

**Before this update is deployed to familyandfriendoutreach.com, YOU must:**

1️⃣ **Review** the law change at the URL above
2️⃣ **Verify** the AI analysis is accurate
3️⃣ **Check** the suggested HTML update (if provided)
4️⃣ **Approve or Deny** this change

**To Approve:**
Reply: `/approve {{ $json.changeRecordId }}`

**To Deny:**
Reply: `/deny {{ $json.changeRecordId }}`

**To View HTML:**
Query database: `SELECT updated_html FROM fafo_law_changes WHERE id={{ $json.changeRecordId }};`

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⏸️ **Status:** PENDING YOUR APPROVAL
🤖 **AI Agent:** Grok (OpenCode)
📅 **Detected:** {{ new Date().toLocaleString('en-US', { timeZone: 'America/New_York' }) }} EST

⚠️ **No changes will be made to FAFO website until you approve!**
